Poudriere Log

Release Notes

0.6.1 (2018-04-12)
Update

    Better support for AES-CBC-HMAC with other key management algs (602555ff3fbd34e875bf0e7b88f4d94dc6000e8b)

Fix

    Explicit defined() usage for CJOSE_OPENSSL_11X (b6665deae2aec3b68d88edb293b1f6c137e624ce)
